description: A client representative is visiting the site. The site superintendent must log their entry and ensure they have the required PPE.

nodes.task_description: Log the visitor's name, company, and time of entry in the site visitor log.

expected_outcome.value: A new entry is created in the visitor log.

nodes.task_description: Verify the visitor has the required Personal Protective Equipment (PPE): hard hat and safety glasses.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the visitor has the correct PPE.
